dataset.description: The Telco customer churn dataset contains information about a fictional telco company that provided home phone and Internet services to 7043 customers in California in Q3. It indicates which customers have left, stayed, or signed up for their service. Multiple important demographics are included for each customer, as well as a Satisfaction Score, Churn Score, and Customer Lifetime Value (CLTV) index. It is designed to facilitate analysis of customer behavior and retention strategies.

columns.description: Unique identifier for each customer (text format)
columns.name: customer_id

columns.description: Customer Lifetime Value index predicting long-term revenue potential
columns.name: cltv

columns.description: Current status: Stayed, Churned, or Joined the service
columns.name: customer_status

columns.description: Numerical prediction of churn likelihood (5-96 scale)
columns.name: churn_score

columns.description: Primary category for churn reason (Not Applicable/Competitor/Price/etc)
columns.name: churn_category

columns.description: Specific stated reason for customer churn (20 unique reasons)
columns.name: churn_reason

columns.description: Number of months customer has remained with company
columns.name: tenure

columns.description: Indicates if customer subscribes to internet service (Yes/No)
columns.name: internet_service

columns.description: Indicates if customer has phone service (Yes/No)
columns.name: phone_service

columns.description: Indicates if customer has multiple phone lines (Yes/No)
columns.name: multiple_lines

columns.description: Average monthly data consumption in GB
columns.name: avg_monthly_gb_download

columns.description: Indicates if customer has unlimited data plan (Yes/No)
columns.name: unlimited_data

columns.description: Promotional offer type applied to account (A-E)
columns.name: offer

columns.description: Primary payment method type (Electronic check/Mailed check/etc)
columns.name: payment_method

columns.description: Average monthly long distance call costs
columns.name: avg_monthly_long_distance_charges

columns.description: Cumulative overage charges beyond data limits
columns.name: total_extra_data_charges

columns.description: Total long distance call costs over lifetime
columns.name: total_long_distance_charges

columns.description: Customer country (United States for all records)
columns.name: country

columns.description: Population count of customer's residential area
columns.name: total_population

columns.description: Indicates if customer has a life partner (Yes/No)
columns.name: partner

desc: The Telco customer churn dataset contains information about a fictional telco company that provided home phone and Internet services to 7043 customers in California in Q3. It indicates which customers have left, stayed, or signed up for their service. Multiple important demographics are included for each customer, as well as a Satisfaction Score, Churn Score, and Customer Lifetime Value (CLTV) index. It is designed to facilitate analysis of customer behavior and retention strategies.
goal: Use customer demographics, satisfaction score, churn score, and CLTV to predict which customers are likely to churn in the coming months, helping the company implement retention strategies.
name: Visual Analytics System telco_goal2_1742624715

effect.description: Filters subsequent views to selected contract-internet_type combinations

visualization.description: Grouped bar chart showing churn rates by contract types and internet service technologies

effect.description: Selects high-risk clusters for detailed analysis

visualization.description: Scatter plot showing high-value customers with churn risk indicators
Multi-line chart showing CLTV trajectories by churn reason
Heatmap revealing satisfaction patterns across demographics
Hexbin plot with DBSCAN clusters showing churn/revenue patterns

data.reason: This step is necessary to create a unified view of all relevant data for the VAS.
data.requirement: Combine customer demographics, satisfaction score, churn score, and CLTV data into a single dataset for analysis

data.reason: This step ensures that the data is prepared for use in the VAS and is organized in a way that facilitates the creation of high-quality visualizations.
data.requirement: Create intermediate tables for each view based on the unified dataset

interaction.reason: This interaction will enable users to explore the data in more detail and identify patterns based on specific segments.
interaction.requirement: Allow users to filter the data by specific demographics, such as age group and income level

visualization.reason: This visualization will help identify patterns in customer behavior based on demographic variables and satisfaction levels.
visualization.requirement: Generate a heat map that displays the relationship between age and number of dependents, with a color scale representing satisfaction scores

visualization.reason: This chart will help identify trends in customer lifetime value based on churn reasons.
visualization.requirement: Create a multi-line chart that shows the average CLTV over time for different churn categories

sqls.SQL: CREATE VIEW vw_overview AS SELECT Status_Analysis.churn_label, Payment_Info.contract, Online_Services.internet_type FROM Status_Analysis JOIN Payment_Info ON Status_Analysis.customer_id = Payment_Info.customer_id JOIN Online_Services ON Status_Analysis.customer_id = Online_Services.customer_id
sqls.name: vw_overview

sqls.SQL: CREATE VIEW vw_exploration_2 AS SELECT Status_Analysis.churn_score, Status_Analysis.cltv, Status_Analysis.satisfaction_score, Status_Analysis.customer_id FROM Status_Analysis
sqls.name: vw_exploration_2

sqls.SQL: CREATE VIEW vw_exploration_3 AS SELECT Service_Options.tenure, Status_Analysis.churn_category, Status_Analysis.cltv, Status_Analysis.customer_id FROM Service_Options JOIN Status_Analysis ON Service_Options.customer_id = Status_Analysis.customer_id
sqls.name: vw_exploration_3

sqls.SQL: CREATE VIEW vw_detail_4 AS SELECT Customer_Info.age, Customer_Info.number_of_dependents, Status_Analysis.satisfaction_score, Status_Analysis.customer_id FROM Customer_Info JOIN Status_Analysis ON Customer_Info.customer_id = Status_Analysis.customer_id
sqls.name: vw_detail_4

sqls.SQL: CREATE VIEW vw_insight_5 AS SELECT Payment_Info.monthly_charges, Payment_Info.total_revenue, Status_Analysis.churn_value, Payment_Info.customer_id FROM Payment_Info JOIN Status_Analysis ON Payment_Info.customer_id = Status_Analysis.customer_id
sqls.name: vw_insight_5

tasks.method: Grouped bar charts with x-axis: contract type, y-axis: churn rate %, clustered color encoding for internet_type. Calculate churn rates (Yes%) per category combination using unified customer profiles.
tasks.objective: Identify high-churn service configurations by contract type and internet technology

tasks.method: Heat map with rows: age bins (20-29,...,70+), columns: dependents (0,1-2,3+), color intensity: average satisfaction_score. Tooltips show exact values and sample counts.
tasks.objective: Detect demographic patterns in satisfaction levels that may predict churn

tasks.method: Multi-line chart with x-axis: tenure cohorts (0-3mo,...,25+mo), y-axis: average CLTV, color encoding: churn_category. Filtered to churned customers only. Trend lines smoothed using LOESS regression.
tasks.objective: Analyze CLTV trajectory patterns associated with different churn reasons over time

tasks.method: Interactive scatter plot with x: churn_score, y: CLTV, color: satisfaction_score (gradient 1-5). Brush-and-zoom for selecting outliers. Dynamic filtering of other views when selecting high-risk clusters.
tasks.objective: Isolate high-value customers (CLTV top 10%) with elevated churn scores and low satisfaction

tasks.method: Age group slider (20-29,...,70+) filters parallel coordinates plot showing service adoption (unlimited_data, tech_support) vs churn rates. Updates propagate to all views.
tasks.objective: Analyze age-specific service preferences and their relationship to churn

tasks.method: Density-based clustering (DBSCAN) visualized as contour overlays on a hexbin plot. X: monthly_charges, y: total_revenue, contour colors: churn density clusters. Interactive cluster selection highlights customer IDs.
tasks.objective: Identify pricing/revenue patterns in churn hotspots

concat.description: Overview: Churn Rate by Contract and Internet Type
Exploration: Churn Score vs CLTV with Satisfaction
Exploration: Average CLTV by Tenure and Churn Category
Detail: Satisfaction Score by Age and Number of Dependents
Insight: Monthly Charges vs Total Revenue
